For Arctic Biological Reanalysis Product 
ARCTIC_MULTIYEAR_BGC_002_005

Approval date by the CMEMS product quality coordination team: 20/07/2022

CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated  and a row is added to this table.  
The third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column 
should mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document describes the quality of the product ARCTIC_MULTIYEAR_BGC_002_005, the reanalysis 
product for the biogeochemical state of the Arctic Ocean from 2007 to 2019. The validation considers all 
data in the Arctic region (North of 60 N). The ARC biogeochemical product contains 2D daily fields and 3D 
monthly fields at 25 km horizontal resolution of nine variables grouped in 5 categories: 
 
PLANKTON:  Chlorophyll-a (CHL), Phytoplankton (PHYC), Zooplankton (ZOOC). 
NUTRIENTS: Nitrate (NO3), Phosphate (PO4), Silicate (Si). 
PRIMARY PRODUCTION: Primary Production (NPPV). 
OXYGEN: Oxygen (O2). 
TRANSPARENCY/TURBIDITY: Light Attenuation (Kd).
